results.title: Canada draw with Bosnia-Herzegovina to earn first-ever World Cup point
results.description: Canada draw with Bosnia-Herzegovina to earn first-ever World Cup point

results.title: DR Congo's World Cup journey begins in Houston amid smiles and hope
results.description: The Congolese arrived in the United States on Thursday, one of the last teams to travel, and face Portugal in their Group K opener in Houston on Wednesday. Colombia and Uzbekistan are the other two teams in the pool

results.title: Azerbaijan's Shusha hosts Competition Forum of OTS countries (PHOTO)
USA Thrash Paraguay 4-1 in World Cup Opener as Balogun Nets Brace
results.description: The United States opened its home FIFA World Cup campaign with a commanding 4-1 win over Paraguay in Los Angeles.
